title: eragrostis longiramea
intro: Eragrostis longiramea, also known as blue grama grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the Great Plains region in North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of blue grama grass include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from pain and discomfort. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of the plant are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
